disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic itchy scaling between the toes with white maceration and a deep fissure, plus fine 'moccasin' scaling of the soles/sides
trigger_question_examples: Is the skin between the toes white, macerated and split, with scaling over the soles/sides of the foot?
Is this on a background of chronic itchy scaly feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, white macerated split skin between the toes and fine scaling over the soles/sides, on a background of chronic itchy scaly feet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No hot/red swelling ascending the top of the foot/ankle, no red streaks up the leg, no fever (ascending-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Is the top of your foot/ankle becoming hot, red and swollen, any red streaks up the leg, or a fever?
Is redness climbing up from the foot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, the top of my foot and ankle look normal, no red streaks and no fever.
